frames.caption: Cursor on `quick`.
frames.narration: *Normal mode*. We will run {key:d}{key:w}: the {key:d} delete operator with the {key:w} word motion.

frames.caption: {key:d}{key:w} — `quick` deleted.
frames.narration: Operator {key:d} (verb) plus motion {key:w} (noun). Same grammar applies for any operator+motion pair.

frames.caption: {key:g}{key:U}{key:w} — `BROWN` uppercased.
frames.narration: Swap the operator for {key:g}{key:U} (uppercase), keep motion {key:w}. Free upgrade — every motion works with every operator.
